executive_summary.description: A high-level overview of the comparison between the four Nifty momentum indices, summarizing the key findings on performance, risk, and suitability for a long-term Indian investor as of April 2026.

best_fund_recommendation.description: Provides a direct recommendation on which momentum index strategy is best suited for a long-term Indian investor, explaining the rationale based on risk appetite, market capitalization exposure, and historical performance trends.

index_name.description: Name of the momentum index (e.g., Nifty 200 Momentum 30).

objective.description: The stated investment objective of the index.

parent_index.description: The broader market index from which constituents are selected.

number_of_constituents.description: The total number of stocks included in the index.

launch_date.description: The date when the index was first launched.

rebalancing_frequency.description: The frequency at which the index constituents are reviewed and rebalanced (e.g., Semi-Annually).

momentum_indices_profile.description: An array providing a detailed profile for each of the four momentum indices: Nifty 200 Momentum 30, Nifty 500 Momentum 50, Nifty Midcap150 Momentum 50, and Nifty Smallcap250 Momentum Quality 100. Each profile will include its objective, parent index, number of constituents, and launch date.

index_methodology_comparison.description: A detailed comparison of the methodologies used by each index, focusing on stock selection criteria (e.g., normalized momentum score calculation), weighting mechanism (e.g., free-float market cap combined with momentum score), and rebalancing frequency.

index_name.description: Name of the index being analyzed.

one_year_return.description: Absolute return percentage over the last one year.

three_year_cagr.description: Compounded Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) over the last three years.

five_year_cagr.description: Compounded Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) over the last five years.

index_name.description: Name of the index being analyzed.

standard_deviation.description: Annualised standard deviation, a measure of volatility.

beta.description: Beta of the index relative to the Nifty 50, measuring systematic risk.

correlation.description: Correlation of the index's returns with the Nifty 50.

max_drawdown_percentage.description: The largest peak-to-trough decline in the index's history, expressed as a percentage.

index_name.description: Name of the index being analyzed.

market_cap_focus.description: Primary market capitalization focus (e.g., Large Cap, Mid Cap, Small Cap).

top_sector_name.description: The name of the top weighted sector in the index.

top_sector_weight.description: The weightage of the top sector in the index as a percentage.

top_constituent_name.description: The name of the top weighted stock in the index.

top_constituent_weight.description: The weightage of the top stock in the index as a percentage.

index_name.description: Name of the index being analyzed.

pe_ratio.description: Aggregate Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio of the index.

pb_ratio.description: Aggregate Price-to-Book (P/B) ratio of the index.

dividend_yield.description: Aggregate dividend yield of the index as a percentage.

fund_name.description: Official name of the mutual fund or ETF.

amc.description: Asset Management Company managing the fund (e.g., Motilal Oswal, HDFC).

tracked_index.description: The specific Nifty momentum index the fund aims to replicate.

fund_type.description: The structure of the fund (e.g., Index Fund, ETF).

available_fund_options.description: A list of available index funds and ETFs from the specified AMCs (Motilal Oswal, Tata, HDFC, ICICI, Kotak, Bandhan, Groww) that track the respective momentum indices. Details will include the fund name, AMC, and the index it tracks.

analysis_of_nifty_200_momentum_30.description: A specific analysis of the Nifty 200 Momentum 30 index, discussing its large-cap orientation, concentration, and suitability for investors looking for momentum within a relatively stable universe.

analysis_of_nifty_500_momentum_50.description: A specific analysis of the Nifty 500 Momentum 50 index, highlighting its broad market exposure across large, mid, and small caps, and its potential as a core momentum holding.

analysis_of_nifty_midcap150_momentum_50.description: A specific analysis of the Nifty Midcap150 Momentum 50 index, focusing on its higher growth potential and associated volatility from the mid-cap space.

analysis_of_nifty_smallcap250_momentum_q.description: A specific analysis of the Nifty Smallcap250 Momentum Quality 100 index, detailing its unique dual-factor approach (Momentum and Quality) and its high-risk, high-return profile within the small-cap segment.

long_term_investor_suitability.description: An in-depth discussion on how each index fits into a long-term investment strategy, considering factors like investment horizon, risk tolerance, and the role of different market caps in a diversified portfolio.

momentum_investing_primer.description: A brief explanation of the momentum factor, how it works, and why it is considered a potential source of excess returns in factor investing.

key_risks_of_momentum_investing.description: An outline of the inherent risks associated with the momentum strategy, such as factor cyclicality (underperformance in certain market regimes), potential for sharp drawdowns ('momentum crashes'), and higher portfolio churn.

taxation_implications_for_investors.description: A summary of the taxation rules applicable to Indian investors for gains from equity index funds, including short-term and long-term capital gains tax as of 2026.
